## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added a `[Unreleased]` entry to `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
- [ ] Updated documentation under `docs/` if relevant
- [ ] If adding an agent plugin: registered it in `agents/registry.py`, wrote a `tests/agents/` round-trip test, and added a `docs/clients/<name>.md`
